entries.description_en: Turn an article or system design into a premium black-canvas hand-drawn architecture/process diagram from one JSON spec, producing an editable .excalidraw source, a static PNG preview, and a genuinely animated GIF with moving flow highlights and pulsing module accents. Renders locally with Python/Pillow using a fixed art-directed layout, and ships frame-diff verification to prove the GIF actually moves.
entries.long_zh: 把技术内容转成统一、精致的一套图（Excalidraw + PNG + 动图 GIF），让架构与流程讲解呈现为有设计感的视觉，而非平铺的方框与箭头。
entries.long_en: Converts technical content into a consistent, polished diagram set (Excalidraw + PNG + animated GIF) so architecture and process explanations read as designed visuals rather than flat boxes-and-arrows.
entries.sec_note_zh: 在本地运行内置的 Python 渲染器（Pillow）生成 .excalidraw/.png/.gif——不联网、无远程 API、无外部图标库。需要 Python 3.9+ 与 Pillow（ffprobe 可选，用于媒体检查）。作者按 Codex skill 定位与宣传，但采用通用的 SKILL.md 格式与平台无关的 Python 渲染器。
entries.sec_note_en: Runs a bundled Python renderer (Pillow) entirely on the local machine to emit .excalidraw/.png/.gif — no network, remote APIs, or external icon libraries. Requires Python 3.9+ and Pillow (ffprobe optional for media inspection). Authored and marketed as a Codex skill, but uses the portable SKILL.md format and a platform-agnostic Python renderer.

entries.name: GEO Brand Knowledge Graph
entries.description: Turns company materials, official sites, products, cases and people into an evidence-backed brand entity knowledge graph, outputting entity/relation lists, a disambiguation table, confidence tiers, Mermaid diagrams, JSON-LD, RDF triples and Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 把企业资料、官网、产品、客户案例和人物整理成有证据支撑的品牌实体知识图谱，输出实体/关系清单、消歧表、可信等级、Mermaid 图、JSON-LD、RDF 三元组以及 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 报告。
entries.description_en: Turns company materials, official sites, products, cases and people into an evidence-backed brand entity knowledge graph, outputting entity/relation lists, a disambiguation table, confidence tiers, Mermaid diagrams, JSON-LD, RDF triples and Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
entries.long_zh: 构建一致、可溯源的品牌知识图谱，为 GEO 内容、页面结构和 AI 答案一致性治理提供底座。
entries.long_en: Build a consistent, evidence-traceable brand knowledge graph to power GEO content, page structure and AI-answer consistency.
entries.sec_note_zh: 捆绑两个 Python 脚本：render_yao_geo_brand_graph.py 从结构化 report_input.json 生成 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 及 quality-report.json，collect_source_validation.py 会采样来源 URL 的可达性与页面标题（运行时需要联网）。读取来源账本与结构化输入，本地写出报告文件。不依赖任何私有/厂商系统；每条关系边都必须带证据 ID。
entries.sec_note_en: Bundles two Python scripts: render_yao_geo_brand_graph.py builds Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown plus a quality-report.json from a structured report_input.json, and collect_source_validation.py samples source-URL reachability/page titles (needs network access when run). Reads a source ledger and structured input; writes report files locally. No private/vendor-system dependency; every relation edge requires an evidence ID.

entries.name: GEO Comparison Builder
entries.description: Generates evidence-bound, same-criteria GEO brand-comparison content (vs pages, alternatives, selection pages, FAQ) with a decision-dimension model, source ledger, and scoring matrix, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 生成证据绑定、同口径的 GEO 品牌对比内容（vs 页、替代方案、选型页、FAQ），含决策维度模型、来源台账与评分矩阵，并交付 Word、PDF、HTML、Markdown 四格式。
entries.description_en: Generates evidence-bound, same-criteria GEO brand-comparison content (vs pages, alternatives, selection pages, FAQ) with a decision-dimension model, source ledger, and scoring matrix, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
entries.long_zh: 为国内 AI 平台构建公平、来源锚定的品牌对比，不贬损竞品、不输出未经核验的结论。
entries.long_en: Build fair, source-anchored brand comparisons for domestic AI platforms without disparaging competitors or making unverified claims.
entries.sec_note_zh: 白帽内容优化，非诋毁竞品或检测规避。捆绑 Python DOCX 版式检查脚本（check_docx_layout.py）检测表格溢出。每次运行声明真实数据模式（公开网页、用户文件、授权连接器/API、AI 平台采样）；明确不得读取登录后、付费、内部系统或个人数据，无法核验的市场份额/客户数/价格须删除或降级。仅在启用公开网页或连接器模式时联网。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not competitor smearing or detection evasion. Bundles a Python DOCX layout checker (check_docx_layout.py) for table overflow. Real-data modes (public web, user files, authorized connectors/API, AI-platform sampling) are declared per run; it explicitly must not read logged-in, paywalled, internal-system, or personal data, and unverifiable market-share/customer-count/price claims must be dropped or downgraded. Web access only when public-web or connector mode is enabled.

entries.name: GEO Content Refiner
entries.description: Refactors existing SEO articles, WeChat posts, white papers, or product-page copy into GEO-friendly, AI-citable content, outputting an original GEO score, refined article, before/after diff, atomic fact cards, FAQ, and a four-format report.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 把已有 SEO 文章、公众号稿、白皮书或产品页文案改造成 GEO 友好、AI 可引用的内容，输出原文 GEO 评分、改造版文章、改造前后差异、原子事实卡、FAQ 及四格式报告。
entries.description_en: Refactors existing SEO articles, WeChat posts, white papers, or product-page copy into GEO-friendly, AI-citable content, outputting an original GEO score, refined article, before/after diff, atomic fact cards, FAQ, and a four-format report.
entries.long_zh: 用原子事实、结构补强与证据分级，按八个 GEO 维度提升已有文案的 AI 可抽取性与可引用性。
entries.long_en: Upgrade existing copy for AI extractability and citation with atomic facts, structure, and evidence grading across eight GEO dimensions.
entries.sec_note_zh: 面向 AI 答案引擎的白帽内容优化，非检测规避。基于用户提供的原文与来源工作；无来源时不得虚构数据、价格或案例，未经授权不得访问登录后台、付费数据库、私有 API 或个人数据。仅在操作者允许时可选联网核验。参考文档说明数据访问与核验规则，版式规则约束 DOCX/PDF 表格处理。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization for AI answer engines, not detection evasion. Works from user-supplied source text and sources; it must not invent data, prices, or cases without sources, and must not access logged-in backends, paid databases, private APIs, or personal data without authorization. Optional web verification only when the operator allows it. Reference docs describe data-access and verification rules; layout rules govern DOCX/PDF table handling.

entries.name: GEO Effect Monitor
entries.description: Designs a GEO answer-monitoring plan for Chinese answer engines (DeepSeek, Doubao, Qianwen, Kimi, Tencent Yuanbao): per-platform sampling specs, a prompt library, a six-layer metric system, citation-source tracking, a cautious attribution framework, a brand-fact correction loop, alert/threshold rules, dashboard fields and a DB/API draft, delivered as Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 为国内 AI 答案引擎（DeepSeek、豆包、千问、Kimi、腾讯元宝）设计 GEO 答案监测方案：各平台独立采样口径、Prompt 库、六层指标体系、引用源追踪、谨慎归因框架、品牌事实纠偏闭环、阈值告警规则、仪表盘字段与数据库/API 草案，并交付 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 报告。
entries.description_en: Designs a GEO answer-monitoring plan for Chinese answer engines (DeepSeek, Doubao, Qianwen, Kimi, Tencent Yuanbao): per-platform sampling specs, a prompt library, a six-layer metric system, citation-source tracking, a cautious attribution framework, a brand-fact correction loop, alert/threshold rules, dashboard fields and a DB/API draft, delivered as Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
entries.long_zh: 面向长期运营的 GEO 测量闭环，追踪 AI 答案中的品牌可见性、事实准确性与引用质量，并做有证据分级的谨慎归因。
entries.long_en: A long-running GEO measurement loop that tracks brand visibility, factuality and citation quality in AI answers, with disciplined, evidence-graded attribution.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属于正当的测量/分析：其方法学涉及对 AI 平台答案进行采样（记录答案原文、引用链接、截图、导出文件与采样环境），用于计算品牌出现率、推荐率、描述准确率和引用质量等指标。明确禁止绕过平台限制、批量滥采、模拟真人登录或违反服务条款，并要求任何批量自动化写明频率、权限与人工复核边界。不含捆绑脚本（以模板/参考驱动）；产物是监测方案与报告，而非爬虫。实际采样需要联网/平台访问；缺少可审计原始样本的结果必须标为合成或待复核。
entries.sec_note_en: This is legitimate measurement/analytics: its methodology involves SAMPLING AI platform answers (recording raw answer text, citation links, screenshots, exports and the sampling environment) to compute brand-appearance, recommendation, accuracy and citation-quality metrics. It explicitly forbids bypassing platform limits, bulk over-scraping, faking human login, or violating terms of service, and requires any bulk automation to declare frequency, permissions and a human-review boundary. No bundled scripts (template/reference-driven); output is a monitoring PLAN plus reports, not a crawler. Actual sampling requires web/platform access; results without auditable raw samples must be marked synthetic or pending.

entries.name: GEO Execution Roadmap
entries.description: Turns an existing GEO diagnosis and opportunity map into a 30/60/90-day execution plan with six project packages (page tech, content matrix, titles, knowledge base, external evidence, monitoring), roles, acceptance metrics, budget, and platform-specific actions for DeepSeek, Doubao, Qwen, Kimi, and Yuanbao, output in four formats.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 把已有的 GEO 诊断与机会地图转成 30/60/90 天执行方案，含六个项目包（页面技术、内容矩阵、标题体系、知识库、外部证据、监测闭环）、角色分工、验收指标、预算，以及面向 DeepSeek、豆包、千问、Kimi、元宝的平台化动作，四格式输出。
entries.description_en: Turns an existing GEO diagnosis and opportunity map into a 30/60/90-day execution plan with six project packages (page tech, content matrix, titles, knowledge base, external evidence, monitoring), roles, acceptance metrics, budget, and platform-specific actions for DeepSeek, Doubao, Qwen, Kimi, and Yuanbao, output in four formats.
entries.long_zh: 把 GEO 诊断结论落成可问责的 30/60/90 天路线图，明确负责人、指标与预算，让团队产出可被 AI 答案引擎引用的内容。
entries.long_en: Converts GEO findings into an accountable 30/60/90-day roadmap with owners, metrics, and budget so teams can ship content that AI answer engines can cite.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属白帽内容规划，非操纵。manifest 声明 requires_web: false；它承接已有诊断/机会地图而非自行抓取。打包了一个 Python3 脚本（scripts/render_yao_geo_execution_roadmap.py），从 JSON 输入渲染四格式（Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown）报告并写出 quality-report.json。读取输入 JSON、写出报告文件；默认输出语言为简体中文。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content planning, not manipulation. Manifest declares requires_web: false; it consumes a prior diagnosis/opportunity map rather than crawling. Bundles a Python3 script (scripts/render_yao_geo_execution_roadmap.py) that renders the four-format (Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown) report from a JSON input and writes a quality-report.json. Reads input JSON and writes report files; default output language is Simplified Chinese.

entries.name: GEO Explainer Builder
entries.description: Builds a complete publishable GEO explainer article (how-to, concept explanation, buying guides, pitfalls, FAQ, glossary, evidence grading) plus a data-verification appendix, delivered as Markdown, HTML, Word, and PDF.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 生成一篇完整可发布的 GEO 科普文章（How-to、概念解释、选择指南、避坑清单、FAQ、术语表、证据分级）及真实数据核验附录，并交付 Markdown、HTML、Word、PDF 四格式。
entries.description_en: Builds a complete publishable GEO explainer article (how-to, concept explanation, buying guides, pitfalls, FAQ, glossary, evidence grading) plus a data-verification appendix, delivered as Markdown, HTML, Word, and PDF.
entries.long_zh: 为国内 AI 搜索平台产出深度、可引用、含上下文无关核心摘要与自然品牌植入的中文科普内容。
entries.long_en: Produce in-depth, citable Chinese explainer content with a self-contained core summary and natural brand placement for domestic AI search platforms.
entries.sec_note_zh: 白帽内容优化，非 AI 检测规避。捆绑 Python 渲染脚本（render_yao_geo_explainer_builder.py）生成四格式及 quality-report.json。技能本身不保证联网抓取：真实数据须由上层 agent 检索、用户上传或已有知识库提供并登记来源；未经核验的品牌/效果/安全断言须降级或删除。健康、金融、法律等敏感领域须加入边界提醒。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not AI-detection evasion. Bundles a Python renderer (render_yao_geo_explainer_builder.py) that emits the four formats plus a quality-report.json. The skill itself does not guarantee live web scraping: real data must be supplied by an upper agent's retrieval, user uploads, or an existing knowledge base, with sources recorded; unverified brand/effect/safety claims must be downgraded or removed. Sensitive domains (health, finance, legal) require boundary disclaimers.

entries.name: GEO Knowledge Base Builder
entries.description: Builds an evidence-backed, auditable GEO brand knowledge base from official sites, product pages, help centers, white papers and trusted third-party sources, outputting a complete entity inventory, fact cards, FAQ, prohibited-expression list, source index with evidence tiers, downstream prompt input packs and a four-format Chinese report (Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF).
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 从官网、产品页、帮助中心、白皮书和可信第三方来源构建可审计、可复用的 GEO 品牌知识库，输出完整实体清单、事实卡、FAQ、禁用表述清单、带证据等级的来源索引、下游 Prompt 输入包以及四格式中文报告（Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF）。
entries.description_en: Builds an evidence-backed, auditable GEO brand knowledge base from official sites, product pages, help centers, white papers and trusted third-party sources, outputting a complete entity inventory, fact cards, FAQ, prohibited-expression list, source index with evidence tiers, downstream prompt input packs and a four-format Chinese report (Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF).
entries.long_zh: 一份分级证据、可复用的品牌知识库，为面向国内 AI 答案引擎的 GEO 内容、监测、页面设计和客服准备提供一致输入。
entries.long_en: A reusable, evidence-tiered brand knowledge base that feeds consistent GEO content, monitoring, page design and customer-service prep for Chinese answer engines.
entries.sec_note_zh: manifest 声明 requires_web: true：联网时采集并核验公开官方与第三方来源，离线时降级为基于用户提供文件/人工简报输出。捆绑 Python 渲染器 render_four_format.py，本地生成 Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF 及 quality-report.json。按 A-D 分级证据，未核验声明保留在待确认区。属于面向 Kimi/千问/DeepSeek/豆包/元宝的白帽内容与信源整理，而非操纵 AI 答案；不依赖私有 CLI 或内网。
entries.sec_note_en: Manifest declares requires_web: true: it collects and verifies public official and third-party sources online, and degrades to user-provided files / manual brief when offline. Bundles a Python renderer (render_four_format.py) that writes Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF plus quality-report.json locally. Separates evidence tiers (A-D) and keeps unverified claims in a pending-confirmation area. This is white-hat content/source organization for Kimi/Qianwen/DeepSeek/Doubao/Yuanbao, not answer manipulation; no private CLI or intranet dependency.

entries.name: GEO Page Audit
entries.description: Audits a URL or small page set for GEO readiness across crawlability, structure, content evidence, and AI extractability, producing code-layer fixes, content/schema suggestions, an evidence ledger, and a four-format report with a quality-report.json self-check.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 针对一个 URL 或少量页面做 GEO 就绪度诊断，覆盖可抓取性、结构、内容证据与 AI 可抽取性，产出代码层修复、内容/Schema 建议、证据台账，以及带 quality-report.json 自检的四格式报告。
entries.description_en: Audits a URL or small page set for GEO readiness across crawlability, structure, content evidence, and AI extractability, producing code-layer fixes, content/schema suggestions, an evidence ledger, and a four-format report with a quality-report.json self-check.
entries.long_zh: 诊断公开页面被 AI 搜索系统发现、解析与引用的程度，给出可直接落地的代码、内容与 Schema 修复建议。
entries.long_en: Diagnoses how well public pages can be discovered, parsed, and cited by AI search systems, with implementation-ready code, content, and schema fixes.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属白帽页面优化，非操纵。manifest 声明 requires_web: true；会抓取目标 URL，并优先以官方/标准/研究类来源作为证据。打包了 Python3 脚本（scripts/polish_docx.py 处理 Word 排版，scripts/review_report_layout.py 做版式检查）。读取目标页面及用户输入、写出 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 报告；默认输出语言为简体中文。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat page optimization, not manipulation. Manifest declares requires_web: true; it fetches the target URL and prefers official/standards/research sources for evidence. Bundles Python3 scripts (scripts/polish_docx.py for Word typography, scripts/review_report_layout.py for layout checks). Reads the target page plus user inputs and writes Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports; default output language is Simplified Chinese.

entries.name: GEO Page Blueprint
entries.description: Designs a GEO-friendly page blueprint for a product, topic, ranking, comparison, FAQ, knowledge-base, or case page, producing query fan-out coverage, information architecture, AI-extractable modules, semantic HTML, Schema candidates, a CMS field list, and a four-format report.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 为产品、专题、榜单、对比、FAQ、知识库或案例页设计 GEO 友好的页面蓝图，产出查询 fan-out 覆盖、信息架构、AI 可抽取模块、语义化 HTML、Schema 候选、CMS 字段清单与四格式报告。
entries.description_en: Designs a GEO-friendly page blueprint for a product, topic, ranking, comparison, FAQ, knowledge-base, or case page, producing query fan-out coverage, information architecture, AI-extractable modules, semantic HTML, Schema candidates, a CMS field list, and a four-format report.
entries.long_zh: 把内容目标落成可实施的页面结构，同时服务 AI 答案抽取、真实读者阅读与转化。
entries.long_en: Turns content goals into implementable page structure that serves AI answer extraction, real readers, and conversion at once.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属白帽页面设计，非操纵。manifest 声明 requires_web: false；联网仅是可选的 “assisted-web-research” 数据模式，否则基于用户提供的来源包进行规划。打包了一个 Python3 脚本（scripts/render_yao_geo_page_blueprint.py），从 report_input.json 渲染四格式（Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF）报告。Schema 候选受限于页面已有事实（不伪造评分/价格）。默认输出语言为简体中文。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat page design, not manipulation. Manifest declares requires_web: false; web access is only an optional 'assisted-web-research' data mode and otherwise it plans from user-supplied source packs. Bundles a Python3 script (scripts/render_yao_geo_page_blueprint.py) that renders the four-format (Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF) report from report_input.json. Schema candidates are constrained to facts present on the page (no fabricated ratings/prices). Default output language is Simplified Chinese.

entries.name: GEO Panorama Audit
entries.description: Runs a full-brand GEO baseline audit by crawling the brand's official site, cross-verifying claims against public sources, and producing a 12-domain diagnosis with an onsite/offsite opportunity map and priorities, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 通过抓取品牌官网、用公开信源交叉核验断言，做一次全品牌 GEO 基线诊断，产出 12 个诊断域的报告、站内/站外机会地图与优先级，交付 Word、PDF、HTML、Markdown 四格式。
entries.description_en: Runs a full-brand GEO baseline audit by crawling the brand's official site, cross-verifying claims against public sources, and producing a 12-domain diagnosis with an onsite/offsite opportunity map and priorities, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
entries.long_zh: 为品牌建立 GEO 基线，让内容可被 AI 答案引擎发现与引用，并给出有证据支撑的站内、站外行动方案。
entries.long_en: Establishes a brand's GEO baseline so content is discoverable and citable by AI answer engines, with evidence-backed onsite and offsite action plans.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属白帽内容优化，非操纵。需要联网抓取品牌官网并交叉核验公开信源（manifest 诊断口径为 official-site-crawl-and-cross-verification）。不含打包脚本；四格式（Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown）报告由 agent 自行生成。读取用户提供的品牌资料、写出报告文件；默认输出语言为简体中文。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not manipulation. Needs web access to crawl the brand's official site and cross-verify public sources (manifest diagnosis_basis: official-site-crawl-and-cross-verification). No bundled scripts; the agent generates the four-format (Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown) reports itself. Reads brand-supplied inputs and writes report files; default output language is Simplified Chinese.

entries.name: GEO Ranking Article Builder
entries.description: Turns a brand brief, topic config, keywords, competitor set, and trusted sources into a traceable GEO ranking/review article (best/top/alternatives/vs/persona/use-case) with scoring methodology, comparison table, FAQ, and a sources table, delivered as Markdown, HTML, PDF, and Word.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 把品牌 Brief、选题配置、关键词、竞品库和可信来源转成可追溯的 GEO 榜单评测文章（best/top/alternatives/vs/persona/use-case），含评选方法、核心对比表、FAQ 与来源表，并交付 Markdown、HTML、PDF、Word 四格式。
entries.description_en: Turns a brand brief, topic config, keywords, competitor set, and trusted sources into a traceable GEO ranking/review article (best/top/alternatives/vs/persona/use-case) with scoring methodology, comparison table, FAQ, and a sources table, delivered as Markdown, HTML, PDF, and Word.
entries.long_zh: 为国内 AI 平台产出证据支撑的榜单内容，TOP 名次需多源支持，目标品牌只能凭证据获得排名。
entries.long_en: Produce evidence-backed ranking content for domestic AI platforms where TOP picks need multi-source support and the target brand earns rank only through evidence.
entries.sec_note_zh: 白帽内容优化，非刷好评或检测规避；不得虚构竞品、硬排目标品牌第一或使用无来源数据/奖项/价格。捆绑 Python 脚本：audit_sources.py 检查 Markdown 中 URL 是否可访问（需联网），render_ranking_article_pack.py 生成四格式包。仅采集公开数据，明确不绕过登录、付费墙、反爬限制或私有系统权限。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not fake review-stuffing or detection evasion; it must not fabricate competitors, force the target brand to rank first, or use unsourced data/awards/prices. Bundles Python scripts: audit_sources.py checks whether Markdown URLs are reachable (requires web access) and render_ranking_article_pack.py builds the four-format pack. Public-data collection only; it explicitly does not bypass login, paywalls, anti-crawl limits, or private-system permissions.

entries.name: GEO Title Optimizer
entries.description: Generates, scores, and compliance-checks GEO title candidates for Chinese AI search platforms, mapping each title to an article structure and exporting Markdown, HTML, DOCX, and PDF reports.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 为国内 AI 搜索平台生成、评分并做合规审查 GEO 标题候选，将每个标题映射到文章结构，并导出 Markdown、HTML、DOCX、PDF 四格式报告。
entries.description_en: Generates, scores, and compliance-checks GEO title candidates for Chinese AI search platforms, mapping each title to an article structure and exporting Markdown, HTML, DOCX, and PDF reports.
entries.long_zh: 把关键词简报转成合规、可评分、适配 DeepSeek/Kimi/豆包/元宝/通义千问的 GEO 标题方案。
entries.long_en: Turn a keyword brief into compliant, well-scored GEO titles tuned for DeepSeek, Kimi, Doubao, Yuanbao, and Tongyi Qianwen.
entries.sec_note_zh: 面向 AI 答案引擎的白帽内容优化，非检测规避。捆绑 Python 脚本：render_yao_geo_title_optimizer.py 从报告 JSON 生成四格式报告，collect_yao_geo_title_evidence.py 可选抓取公开 URL 以快照状态码、标题与 meta（需联网）。证据采集脚本明确不绕过登录、付费墙、robots 或反爬规则；国内 AI 平台答案需经 API 或人工导出，不自动抓取。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization for AI answer engines, not detection evasion. Bundles Python scripts: render_yao_geo_title_optimizer.py builds the four-format report from a report JSON, and collect_yao_geo_title_evidence.py optionally fetches public URLs to snapshot status code, title, and meta (requires web access). The evidence collector explicitly does not bypass authentication, paywalls, robots, or anti-bot rules; domestic AI platform answers must be supplied via API or manual export, not auto-scraped.

entries.name: GEO Attribution & Tracking Planner
entries.description: From a company name plus optional supporting info, designs a company-specific GEO backend tracking and attribution PLAN: official-site verification, business-type and conversion-path mapping, direct-vs-indirect effect modeling, an observability estimation framework, data-model and metrics design, a prioritized roadmap, and optional rendered HTML and Word reports.
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_zh: 从公司名加可选补充信息出发，设计该公司专属的 GEO 后端效果跟踪与归因方案：官网核验、业务类型与转化链路映射、直接/间接效果双层建模、可观测性估算框架、数据模型与指标口径设计、优先级路线图，并可选生成 HTML 与 Word 报告。
entries.description_en: From a company name plus optional supporting info, designs a company-specific GEO backend tracking and attribution PLAN: official-site verification, business-type and conversion-path mapping, direct-vs-indirect effect modeling, an observability estimation framework, data-model and metrics design, a prioritized roadmap, and optional rendered HTML and Word reports.
entries.long_zh: 产出针对该企业、以证据为锚的 GEO 归因设计与跟踪路线图，并诚实给出可观测性边界，而非通用方法论套话。
entries.long_en: Produces a tailored, evidence-anchored GEO attribution design and tracking roadmap, including an honest observability boundary, rather than a generic methodology template.
entries.sec_note_zh: 联网时以官网为核心做权威检索（先确认官方域名，再读取公开的首页/产品页/关于页/联系页/定价页/案例页）；不能联网时显式降级为仅基于用户材料的低置信度版本。捆绑 Python 渲染器 render_yao_geo_tracking.py，从 report_input.json 生成 .html 与 .docx。产物是规划/归因设计文档，而非实时数据采集器；该 skill 已做开源脱敏，禁止任何私有 CLI、内网地址或公司内部数据。
entries.sec_note_en: Performs authoritative web retrieval anchored on the official website when online (confirms the official domain and reads public homepage/product/about/contact/pricing/case pages); explicitly degrades to a low-confidence, user-material-only version when offline. Bundles a Python renderer (render_yao_geo_tracking.py) that writes .html and .docx from a report_input.json. Output is a planning/attribution-design document, not a live data collector; the skill is explicitly open-source sanitized and forbids any private CLI, intranet address, or internal company data.

entries.name: HyperFrames
entries.description: HyperFrames by HeyGen is an open-source Claude Code plugin that turns HTML/CSS/JS compositions into deterministic MP4 videos, bundling 19 on-demand skills—a router plus creation workflows (product launch, website-to-video, faceless explainer, PR-to-video, captions, motion graphics, music, slideshow) and domain skills (core composition contract, animation adapters, creative direction, media, CLI) that teach agents the full video-production loop.
entries.author: heygen-com
entries.description_zh: HeyGen 出品的 HyperFrames 是一个开源 Claude Code 插件,把 HTML/CSS/JS 合成稿渲染成可复现的 MP4 视频,内置 19 个按需加载的技能——一个路由技能,加上创作工作流(产品发布、网站转视频、无人脸讲解、PR 转视频、字幕、动态图形、音乐、幻灯片)与领域技能(核心合成契约、动画适配器、创意方向、媒体、CLI),教 agent 完成完整的视频制作流程。
entries.description_en: HyperFrames by HeyGen is an open-source Claude Code plugin that turns HTML/CSS/JS compositions into deterministic MP4 videos, bundling 19 on-demand skills—a router plus creation workflows (product launch, website-to-video, faceless explainer, PR-to-video, captions, motion graphics, music, slideshow) and domain skills (core composition contract, animation adapters, creative direction, media, CLI) that teach agents the full video-production loop.
entries.long_zh: 写 HTML,渲染视频:一个 Apache-2.0、面向 agent 的框架,渲染器在无头 Chrome 中逐帧 seek 并用 FFmpeg 编码,产出可复现——无需 React、无需构建步骤、无私有时间轴,也没有按次渲染收费。
entries.long_en: Write HTML, render video: an Apache-2.0, agent-native framework whose renderer seeks each frame in headless Chrome and encodes with FFmpeg for reproducible output—no React, no build step, no proprietary timeline, and no per-render fees.
entries.sec_note_zh: 独立本地渲染器,而非付费 API 薄壳。需要 Node.js 22+、PATH 上的 FFmpeg,以及经 Puppeteer 驱动的无头 Chrome(@hyperframes/engine 包);渲染默认在本地运行,可选 AWS Lambda 路径。它读取你的合成 HTML/媒体,把 MP4 写入项目。可选的媒体功能(TTS 配音、背景音乐/音效)可使用 HeyGen/ElevenLabs/Gemini 的 API key,但也能回退到完全本地的模型(Kokoro TTS、MusicGen、Whisper、u2net 抠图),这些会下载较大的模型文件(约 75MB–3GB)并依赖 Python——HTML 转视频的渲染本身并不需要它们。克隆完整仓库还会拉取约 240MB 的 Git LFS 基准测试产物(可用 GIT_LFS_SKIP_SMUDGE=1 跳过)。
entries.sec_note_en: Standalone local renderer, NOT a paid-API shell. Requires Node.js 22+, FFmpeg on PATH, and headless Chrome driven via Puppeteer (the @hyperframes/engine package); renders run locally with an optional AWS Lambda path. It reads your composition HTML/media and writes MP4s into the project. Optional media features (TTS voiceover, background music/SFX) can use a HeyGen/ElevenLabs/Gemini API key, but fall back to fully local models (Kokoro TTS, MusicGen, Whisper, u2net background-removal) that pull large model downloads (~75MB–3GB) and need Python—none are required for HTML-to-video rendering. Cloning the full repo also fetches ~240MB of Git LFS golden-test baselines (skippable with GIT_LFS_SKIP_SMUDGE=1).

entries.name: FFmpeg Video Analyzer
entries.description: Analyzes a local video file by extracting frames with ffmpeg/ffprobe and delegating frame reading to disposable vision sub-agents, then synthesizes a timestamped, step-by-step Markdown summary (timeline, key moments, narrative).
entries.author: fabriqaai
entries.description_zh: 用 ffmpeg/ffprobe 从本地视频抽帧，把读帧交给一次性的视觉子代理，再综合成带时间戳的逐步 Markdown 摘要（时间线、关键时刻、叙述）。
entries.description_en: Analyzes a local video file by extracting frames with ffmpeg/ffprobe and delegating frame reading to disposable vision sub-agents, then synthesizes a timestamped, step-by-step Markdown summary (timeline, key moments, narrative).
entries.long_zh: 上下文高效的流水线——帧图像只存在于子代理上下文中，主代理只读纯文本批次报告——理解屏幕录制、教程、演示或素材时，比直接读帧省约 90% 上下文。
entries.long_en: A context-efficient pipeline—frame images live only inside sub-agent contexts while the main agent reads text-only batch reports—so understanding screen recordings, tutorials, presentations, or footage costs roughly 90% less context than reading frames directly.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需要本地安装 ffmpeg 与 ffprobe，并需一个具备 AI 视觉模型的代理来读帧；会读取给定视频、向临时目录写入 JPEG 帧与 Markdown（完成后清理）。仓库未提交 LICENSE 文件（README 写的是 MIT，但实际并未附带许可证）。
entries.sec_note_en: Requires ffmpeg and ffprobe installed locally and an agent with an AI vision model to read frames; reads the given video and writes JPEG frames plus Markdown to a temp dir (cleaned up afterward). The repo has no LICENSE file committed (the README states MIT, but no license is actually present).

entries.name: Remotion Best Practices
entries.description: Domain knowledge and best practices for building videos as code with Remotion (React)—animating via useCurrentFrame()/interpolate(), composition and sequence setup, captions, effects, audio, and a one-frame render check.
entries.author: remotion-dev
entries.description_zh: 用 Remotion（React）以代码方式制作视频的领域知识与最佳实践——通过 useCurrentFrame()/interpolate() 做动画、组合与时序编排、字幕、特效、音频，以及单帧渲染自检。
entries.description_en: Domain knowledge and best practices for building videos as code with Remotion (React)—animating via useCurrentFrame()/interpolate(), composition and sequence setup, captions, effects, audio, and a one-frame render check.
entries.long_zh: 加载 Remotion 专属规则（40+ 个主题文件，涵盖布局、转场、字体、3D、音频、ffmpeg、配音等），让代理写出可渲染的 Remotion 代码，而非那些会静默渲染失败的 CSS/Tailwind 动画写法。
entries.long_en: Loads Remotion-specific rules (40+ topic files on layout, transitions, fonts, 3D, audio, ffmpeg, voiceover and more) so an agent writes renderable Remotion code instead of CSS/Tailwind animation patterns that silently fail to render.
entries.sec_note_zh: 这是知识/最佳实践型技能，会通过 npx 实际脚手架并渲染 Remotion 项目（create-video、remotion studio/render），因此需要 Node.js 以及 React 与 Remotion 工具链。Remotion 使用其自有许可证（个人与小团队免费、较大公司需付费），并非标准开源许可证——商用前请先查看。skills 仓库本身根目录没有 LICENSE 文件。
entries.sec_note_en: A knowledge/best-practices skill that scaffolds and renders real Remotion projects via npx (create-video, remotion studio/render), so it needs Node.js plus React and the Remotion toolchain. Remotion ships under its own license (free for individuals and small teams, paid for larger companies), which is not a standard OSS license—check it before commercial use. The skills repo itself has no LICENSE file at root.

entries.name: Video Use
entries.description: Edit any video by conversation with a coding agent—transcribe, cut filler and dead space, color grade, generate overlay animations, and burn subtitles—reasoning from the raw transcript plus on-demand timeline visuals instead of frame-dumping.
entries.author: browser-use
entries.description_zh: 用编码代理通过对话编辑任意视频——转写、剪掉口头语与空白、调色、生成叠加动画、烧录字幕——以原始转录文本加按需的时间线可视化为依据，而非整片抽帧。
entries.description_en: Edit any video by conversation with a coding agent—transcribe, cut filler and dead space, color grade, generate overlay animations, and burn subtitles—reasoning from the raw transcript plus on-demand timeline visuals instead of frame-dumping.
entries.long_zh: 提问 → 确认 → 执行 → 自检 → 持久化：基于打包的短语级转录推理，把每个剪切点对齐到词边界，加 30ms 音频淡入淡出，合成叠加动画（PIL/Remotion/HyperFrames/Manim）与字幕，再在展示前对自己渲染的输出逐个剪切点自检。
entries.long_en: Ask → confirm → execute → self-eval → persist: it reasons over a packed phrase-level transcript, snaps every cut to word boundaries, applies 30ms audio fades, composites overlays (PIL/Remotion/HyperFrames/Manim) and subtitles, then checks its own rendered output at each cut before showing you.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需要本地安装 ffmpeg/ffprobe 与 Python（uv/pip）依赖；转写使用托管的 ElevenLabs Scribe API，需要 ELEVENLABS_API_KEY（付费云服务），存放在仓库根目录的 .env 中。叠加动画可选 Node.js（HyperFrames/Remotion）、图解片段需 Manim、在线源需 yt-dlp。会读取你的素材并把全部输出写入 <videos_dir>/edit/。MIT 许可证。
entries.sec_note_en: Needs ffmpeg/ffprobe and Python (uv/pip) deps installed locally; transcription uses the hosted ElevenLabs Scribe API and requires an ELEVENLABS_API_KEY (a paid cloud service) stored in a .env at the repo root. Optional Node.js for HyperFrames/Remotion overlays, Manim for diagram slots, and yt-dlp for online sources. Reads your footage and writes all outputs to <videos_dir>/edit/. MIT licensed.

entries.name: Manim Composer
entries.description: Turn a vague explainer-video idea into a detailed, scene-by-scene plan (scenes.md): researches the topic, asks about audience/scope/style, then specifies mobjects, animations, narration, pacing, and a color palette in 3Blue1Brown style—before any code is written.
entries.author: adithya-s-k
entries.description_zh: 把模糊的讲解视频想法变成逐场景的详细方案（scenes.md）：先研究主题，再询问受众/范围/风格，然后以 3Blue1Brown 风格写清每场的对象、动画、旁白、节奏与配色——在写任何代码之前完成。
entries.description_en: Turn a vague explainer-video idea into a detailed, scene-by-scene plan (scenes.md): researches the topic, asks about audience/scope/style, then specifies mobjects, animations, narration, pacing, and a color palette in 3Blue1Brown style—before any code is written.
entries.long_zh: adithya-s-k 的 manim_skill 合集中的一个技能（本条目只安装 skills/manim-composer 这一个目录，而非整仓）。它是与版本无关的规划阶段：产出一份 scenes.md 方案（叙事钩子、分场拆解、转场、配色、数学内容、实现顺序），交给 manimce-best-practices 或 manimgl-best-practices 去真正实现。附带 3b1b 叙事模式与视觉技巧的参考文档及空白 scenes 模板；它只做规划，不做渲染。
entries.long_en: One skill from adithya-s-k's manim_skill collection (this entry installs only the skills/manim-composer folder, not the whole repo). It is the planning stage, version-agnostic: it produces a scenes.md spec (narrative hook, scene breakdowns, transitions, color palette, math content, implementation order) meant to be handed off to manimce-best-practices or manimgl-best-practices for actual implementation. Ships reference docs on 3b1b narrative patterns and visual techniques plus a blank scenes template; it plans and does not render.
entries.sec_note_zh: 仅做规划：输出 Markdown 版 scenes.md，不渲染视频，因此自身不需要 Manim/LaTeX/ffmpeg。它会用网络搜索研究主题，故会把你的主题发给代理的搜索工具。后续真正实现所规划的视频，需通过配套技能用到 Python 与 Manim（渲染还需 LaTeX/ffmpeg 工具链）。
entries.sec_note_en: Planning-only: outputs a Markdown scenes.md and does not render video, so it needs no Manim/LaTeX/ffmpeg itself. It uses web search to research the topic, so it sends your topic to the agent's search tool. To later build the planned video you will need Python plus Manim (and a LaTeX/ffmpeg toolchain for rendering) via the companion skills.

entries.name: Manim CE Best Practices
entries.description: Best practices for Manim Community Edition (the `from manim import *` / `manim` CLI engine): scene structure, mobjects, animations, LaTeX/MathTex, coordinate systems and graphing, 3D with ThreeDScene, camera control, updaters, styling, and CLI render flags.
entries.author: adithya-s-k
entries.description_zh: Manim 社区版（`from manim import *` 与 `manim` 命令行引擎）的最佳实践：场景结构、对象、动画、LaTeX/MathTex、坐标系与绘图、ThreeDScene 三维、相机控制、updater、样式与命令行渲染参数。
entries.description_en: Best practices for Manim Community Edition (the `from manim import *` / `manim` CLI engine): scene structure, mobjects, animations, LaTeX/MathTex, coordinate systems and graphing, 3D with ThreeDScene, camera control, updaters, styling, and CLI render flags.
entries.long_zh: adithya-s-k 的 manim_skill 合集中的一个技能（本条目只安装 skills/manimce-best-practices 这一个目录，而非整仓）。面向社区维护的 ManimCE，而非 3b1b 的 ManimGL。打包约 25 个主题规则文件、五个经过测试的示例脚本（基础动画、数学可视化、updater 模式、函数绘图、三维）、可复制修改的场景模板，以及一份包含渲染参数、Jupyter %%manim 单元魔法、安装步骤与 ManimCE/ManimGL 差异对照表的速查表，以避免版本混淆。
entries.long_en: One skill from adithya-s-k's manim_skill collection (this entry installs only the skills/manimce-best-practices folder, not the whole repo). Targets the community-maintained ManimCE, NOT 3b1b's ManimGL. Bundles ~25 topic rule files, five tested example scripts (basic animations, math visualization, updater patterns, graph plotting, 3D), copy-and-modify scene templates, and a quick reference with render flags, Jupyter %%manim cell magic, install steps, and a ManimCE-vs-ManimGL difference table to avoid version confusion.
entries.sec_note_zh: 参考/最佳实践型技能（规则文档 + 示例 .py 文件），自身不写入任何东西。要真正渲染示例，需要 Python 与 Manim 社区版（`pip install manim`），以及本地的 LaTeX/ffmpeg 工具链（TeX Live/MiKTeX/MacTeX + ffmpeg）用于数学排版与视频编码。全部本地渲染，无需付费或云端 API。
entries.sec_note_en: Reference/best-practices skill (rule docs + example .py files); it writes nothing on its own. To actually render the examples you need Python plus Manim Community (`pip install manim`) and a local LaTeX/ffmpeg toolchain (TeX Live/MiKTeX/MacTeX + ffmpeg) for math typesetting and video encoding. All rendering is local; no paid or cloud API required.

entries.name: ManimGL Best Practices
entries.description: Best practices for ManimGL (3Blue1Brown's OpenGL engine, `from manimlib import *` / `manimgl` CLI): InteractiveScene, Tex with tex_to_color_map, self.frame camera control, 3D, and the interactive `-se` / checkpoint_paste() development workflow.
entries.author: adithya-s-k
entries.description_zh: ManimGL（3Blue1Brown 的 OpenGL 引擎，`from manimlib import *` 与 `manimgl` 命令行）的最佳实践：InteractiveScene、带 tex_to_color_map 的 Tex、self.frame 相机控制、三维，以及 `-se` 交互模式与 checkpoint_paste() 开发流。
entries.description_en: Best practices for ManimGL (3Blue1Brown's OpenGL engine, `from manimlib import *` / `manimgl` CLI): InteractiveScene, Tex with tex_to_color_map, self.frame camera control, 3D, and the interactive `-se` / checkpoint_paste() development workflow.
entries.long_zh: adithya-s-k 的 manim_skill 合集中的一个技能（本条目只安装 skills/manimgl-best-practices 这一个目录，而非整仓）。面向 Grant Sanderson 的 ManimGL，而非 Manim 社区版。覆盖 ManimGL 专有写法（ShowCreation 而非 Create、Tex 原始字符串、self.frame.reorient()、self.embed()、backstroke），含规则文件、五个示例脚本、场景模板与差异对照表。注意：附带示例代码改编自 3Blue1Brown 的 videos 仓库，带有其自身许可。
entries.long_en: One skill from adithya-s-k's manim_skill collection (this entry installs only the skills/manimgl-best-practices folder, not the whole repo). Targets Grant Sanderson's ManimGL, NOT Manim Community Edition. Covers ManimGL-specific patterns (ShowCreation vs Create, Tex raw strings, self.frame.reorient(), self.embed(), backstroke) with rule files, five example scripts, scene templates, and a difference table. Note the bundled example code is adapted from 3Blue1Brown's videos repo and carries its own license.
entries.sec_note_zh: 参考/最佳实践型技能（规则文档 + 示例 .py 文件），自身不写入任何东西。渲染需要 Python 与 ManimGL（`pip install manimgl`）以及本地 LaTeX/ffmpeg 工具链；ManimGL 还需要 OpenGL，在 Apple Silicon 上需 brew 安装 pkg-config/cairo。许可注意：附带示例代码改编自 3Blue1Brown 的 videos 仓库，采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0（需署名、禁商用、相同方式共享）——不可用于商业用途。全部本地渲染，无需付费或云端 API。
entries.sec_note_en: Reference/best-practices skill (rule docs + example .py files); it writes nothing on its own. To render you need Python plus ManimGL (`pip install manimgl`) and a local LaTeX/ffmpeg toolchain; ManimGL also needs OpenGL and, on Apple Silicon, brew pkg-config/cairo. Licensing caveat: bundled example code is adapted from 3Blue1Brown's videos repo under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (attribution required, NonCommercial, ShareAlike)—not for commercial use. All rendering is local; no paid or cloud API required.

entries.name: Algorithmic Art
entries.description: Generates interactive algorithmic/generative art using p5.js, producing self-contained HTML artifacts with seeded randomness and parameter controls.
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_zh: 使用 p5.js 生成交互式算法/生成艺术，产出含种子随机性与参数控制的独立 HTML 产物。
entries.description_en: Generates interactive algorithmic/generative art using p5.js, producing self-contained HTML artifacts with seeded randomness and parameter controls.
entries.long_zh: 先起草算法哲学（计算美学宣言），再将其实现为独立 HTML 产物，生成原创生成艺术。通过 cdnjs CDN 加载 p5.js 进行渲染，支持种子随机性（可复现输出）、参数滑块与种子导航。内置模板（viewer.html、generator_template.js）提供 Anthropic 品牌 UI 框架。SKILL.md 明确要求避免复制真实艺术家作品以规避版权问题。
entries.long_en: Creates original generative art by first drafting an algorithmic philosophy (a computational aesthetic manifesto), then implementing it as a self-contained HTML artifact. Uses p5.js loaded from the cdnjs CDN for rendering. Supports seeded randomness for reproducible outputs, parameter sliders for exploration, and seed navigation. Bundled templates (viewer.html, generator_template.js) provide an Anthropic-branded UI shell. SKILL.md explicitly instructs avoiding copying real artists' work to prevent copyright issues.
entries.sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。生成的 HTML 产物在浏览器中运行时从 cdnjs CDN 加载 p5.js，需要出站网络访问；无服务端代码执行，渲染全在用户浏览器端完成，无外部 API 调用或凭据要求。
entries.sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. Produced HTML artifacts fetch p5.js from cdnjs CDN at runtime — requires outbound network access in the browser. No server-side code execution; all rendering happens in the user's browser. No external API calls or credential requirements.

entries.name: Brand Guidelines
entries.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography (Poppins/Lora) to artifacts such as slide decks and documents.
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_zh: 将 Anthropic 官方品牌色彩与字体（Poppins/Lora）应用于幻灯片、文档等产物。
entries.description_en: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography (Poppins/Lora) to artifacts such as slide decks and documents.
entries.long_zh: 提供 Anthropic 精确品牌色板与字体搭配，用于统一视觉风格。主色包括 Dark (#141413)、Light (#faf9f5)、Mid Gray (#b0aea5)；强调色为 Orange (#d97757)、Blue (#6a9bcc)、Green (#788c5d)。标题（24pt+）用 Poppins，正文用 Lora，备用 Arial/Georgia。PPTX 文件通过 python-pptx 处理。非文字形状循环使用强调色。无需网络访问，依赖系统已安装字体。
entries.long_en: Provides Anthropic's exact brand palette and font pairings for consistent visual styling. Main colors: Dark (#141413), Light (#faf9f5), Mid Gray (#b0aea5); accent colors: Orange (#d97757), Blue (#6a9bcc), Green (#788c5d). Applies Poppins to headings (24pt+) and Lora to body text, with Arial/Georgia fallbacks. Uses python-pptx for PPTX files. Accent colors cycle through orange, blue, and green for non-text shapes. No network access required; relies on system-installed fonts.
entries.sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。需安装 Python 及 python-pptx。无网络访问或外部 API 调用。字体可用性取决于系统环境，自动回退至 Arial/Georgia。
entries.sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. Requires Python with python-pptx installed. No network access or external API calls. Font availability depends on the system environment; falls back to Arial/Georgia automatically.

entries.name: Canvas Design
entries.description: Creates original museum-quality visual art as PNG or PDF files, guided by a generated design philosophy manifesto.
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_zh: 依据生成的设计哲学宣言，创作博物馆品质的原创视觉艺术，输出 PNG 或 PDF 文件。
entries.description_en: Creates original museum-quality visual art as PNG or PDF files, guided by a generated design philosophy manifesto.
entries.long_zh: 两阶段技能：先生成视觉哲学宣言（命名美学运动，4-6 段），再通过画布绘制渲染为单页 PNG 或 PDF。从内置 canvas-fonts 目录搜索字体，运行时也可下载额外字体。SKILL.md 强调工艺感、极简文字与原创作品，明确禁止复制真实艺术家作品以规避版权问题。按需支持多页输出（如咖啡桌书风格）。
entries.long_en: Two-phase skill: first generates a visual philosophy manifesto (named aesthetic movement, 4-6 paragraphs), then renders it as a single-page PNG or PDF using canvas drawing. Searches a bundled canvas-fonts directory for typography and may download additional fonts at runtime. SKILL.md stresses expert craftsmanship, minimal text, and original work — explicitly prohibiting copying real artists to avoid copyright issues. Multi-page output (e.g. coffee-table book style) is supported on request.
entries.sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。SKILL.md 指示在系统字体不足时于运行时下载字体，该情况需出站网络访问。无外部 API 调用或凭据要求，输出文件仅为本地 PNG/PDF。
entries.sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. SKILL.md instructs downloading fonts at runtime if system fonts are insufficient — requires outbound network access in that case. No external API calls or credential requirements. Output files are local PNG/PDF only.

entries.name: Claude API Reference
entries.description: Reference documentation for the Claude API and Anthropic SDK — model IDs, pricing, streaming, tool use, MCP, caching, and token counting.
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_zh: Claude API 与 Anthropic SDK 的参考文档，涵盖模型 ID、定价、流式传输、工具调用、MCP、缓存与 token 计数。
entries.description_en: Reference documentation for the Claude API and Anthropic SDK — model IDs, pricing, streaming, tool use, MCP, caching, and token counting.
entries.long_zh: 一个参考型技能，在回答 LLM 应用相关问题之前自动加载最新的 Claude API 与 Anthropic SDK 文档。当提示中涉及 Claude/Anthropic 模型名称、定价限制或 agent/MCP/工具调用模式时自动触发。涵盖 Python 和 TypeScript SDK，避免因训练数据过时而产生错误答案；当检测到非 Anthropic 提供商时自动跳过。
entries.long_en: A reference skill that loads up-to-date Claude API and Anthropic SDK documentation before answering questions about LLM-powered applications. entries.name: Doc Co-Authoring
entries.description: Guides users through a 3-stage co-authoring workflow—context gathering, section-by-section refinement, and reader testing with a fresh Claude—for docs, specs, and proposals.
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_zh: 通过三阶段结构化流程（情境采集、逐节精炼、新会话读者测试）协助用户共同撰写文档、规范与提案。
entries.description_en: Guides users through a 3-stage co-authoring workflow—context gathering, section-by-section refinement, and reader testing with a fresh Claude—for docs, specs, and proposals.
entries.long_zh: 技能引导用户经历三个结构化阶段。第一阶段（情境采集）通过提问收集背景、受众、约束与相关资料，直至 Claude 掌握足够上下文。第二阶段（精炼与结构化）逐节通过头脑风暴、筛选与迭代修改构建文档，可选用 artifact 或本地文件作草稿。第三阶段（读者测试）启用不含当前上下文的新子 agent，验证成品文档能否令读者无歧义地理解。本质上是方法论技能——除非用户主动启用 Slack、Google Drive 等 MCP 集成，否则不调用外部服务。
entries.long_en: The skill walks you through three structured stages. Stage 1 (Context Gathering) collects background, audience, constraints, and related docs—Claude asks clarifying questions until it has enough context. Stage 2 (Refinement & Structure) builds each section through brainstorming, curation, and iterative edits, optionally using an artifact or file as the working draft. Stage 3 (Reader Testing) uses a fresh sub-agent (no context bleed) to verify the finished document answers real reader questions without blind spots. Primarily a methodology skill—no external service calls unless the user optionally enables Slack, Google Drive, or other MCP integrations.

Bundled Python scripts handle unpacking, packing, validation, comment injection, and tracked changes. LibreOffice is required for .doc→.docx conversion and PDF/image export. Install from `skills/docx`, then run `npm install -g docx` and ensure pandoc and LibreOffice are available.

entries.description_en: Extract text/tables, merge, split, rotate, watermark, create, fill forms, OCR, and encrypt PDF files using Python libraries and CLI tools.
entries.long_zh: 涵盖完整的 PDF 操作范围：使用 pypdf 或 pdfplumber 提取文本（含表格转 DataFrame）；使用 reportlab 创建多页 PDF；使用 pypdf 或 qpdf CLI 合并、拆分、旋转、添加水印；使用 pytesseract + pdf2image 对扫描页面进行 OCR；以及填写 PDF 表单（见独立的 FORMS.md）。REFERENCE.md 中涵盖 pypdfium2 和 pdf-lib（JavaScript）的高级用法。从 `skills/pdf` 安装；核心 Python 包：pypdf、pdfplumber、reportlab；可选：pytesseract、pdf2image、pandas；CLI 工具：qpdf、poppler-utils、pdftk。

Install from `skills/pdf`; core Python packages: pypdf, pdfplumber, reportlab; optional: pytesseract, pdf2image, pandas. CLI tools: qpdf, poppler-utils (pdftotext, pdfimages), pdftk.

entries.long_zh: 提供 10 个命名主题（海洋深处、日落大道、森林树冠、现代简约、黄金时刻、北极冰霜、沙漠玫瑰、科技创新、植物花园、午夜星系），每个主题在内置 themes/ 目录中定义，包含十六进制色板与字体搭配。工作流程：展示内置 theme-showcase.pdf → 等待用户选择 → 读取主题文件 → 将配色和字体应用于目标产物。也支持根据文字描述生成自定义主题，兼容 PPTX 幻灯片、文档与 HTML 页面。
entries.long_en: Provides 10 named themes (Ocean Depths, Sunset Boulevard, Forest Canopy, Modern Minimalist, Golden Hour, Arctic Frost, Desert Rose, Tech Innovation, Botanical Garden, Midnight Galaxy), each defined in a bundled themes/ directory with hex color palettes and font pairings. Can also generate a custom theme from a text description. Works with PPTX slides, documents, and HTML pages.

No network access or external API calls required. Reads local bundled theme files and applies styling to artifacts. Font availability depends on the user's environment.

entries.name: Web App Testing
entries.description: Tests local web applications using native Python Playwright scripts, supporting screenshot capture, DOM inspection, console log reading, and server lifecycle management.
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_zh: 通过原生 Python Playwright 脚本测试本地 Web 应用，支持截图、DOM 检查、控制台日志读取及服务器生命周期管理。
entries.description_en: Tests local web applications using native Python Playwright scripts, supporting screenshot capture, DOM inspection, console log reading, and server lifecycle management.
entries.long_zh: 基于 Playwright 的技能，用于验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为和自动化本地 Web 应用交互。遵循「侦察后行动」模式：导航、等待 networkidle、检查渲染 DOM 或截图、识别选择器、执行操作。内置 with_server.py 辅助脚本，可管理一个或多个开发服务器进程。支持静态 HTML（file:// URL）和动态单页应用。需要 Python、playwright 包以及单独安装的 Playwright 浏览器二进制文件。
entries.long_en: A Playwright-based skill for verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, and automating local web app interactions. Follows a reconnaissance-then-action pattern: navigate, wait for networkidle, inspect the rendered DOM or take a screenshot, identify selectors, then execute actions. Bundles a with_server.py helper that manages one or more dev-server processes. Can handle both static HTML (via file:// URLs) and dynamic single-page apps. Requires Python, the playwright package, and Playwright browser binaries installed separately.
entries.sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。通过 Playwright 驱动真实 Chromium 浏览器，需要 Python、`playwright` 包（`pip install playwright`）及浏览器二进制文件（`playwright install chromium`）。执行 Python 脚本，可作为子进程启动本地开发服务器。仅与 localhost 交互，技能本身不发起外部网络请求。
entries.sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. Drives a real Chromium browser via Playwright; requires Python, the `playwright` package (`pip install playwright`), and browser binaries (`playwright install chromium`). Executes Python scripts and can start local dev servers as subprocesses. Interacts only with localhost; no external network calls from the skill itself. Runs locally.

entries.name: XLSX
entries.description: Create, read, and edit Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheets with pandas for data analysis and openpyxl for formulas, formatting, and multi-sheet workbooks.
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_zh: 使用 pandas 进行数据分析、openpyxl 处理公式与格式，创建、读取和编辑 Excel (.xlsx) 电子表格，支持多工作表和财务模型。
entries.description_en: Create, read, and edit Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheets with pandas for data analysis and openpyxl for formulas, formatting, and multi-sheet workbooks.
entries.long_zh: 涵盖使用 pandas 读取电子表格数据（批量操作、统计分析、多表导入）；使用 openpyxl 创建和编辑工作簿（Excel 公式、单元格样式、列宽、工作表管理）；以及通过内置的 `scripts/recalc.py` 以无头模式调用 LibreOffice 重新计算公式。包含财务模型规范：输入/公式/跨表链接的行业标准色彩编码、数字格式规则和公式验证清单。从 `skills/xlsx` 安装；所需：`pip install pandas openpyxl`；公式重算需要安装 LibreOffice。
entries.long_en: Covers reading spreadsheet data with pandas (bulk ops, statistics, multi-sheet import), creating and editing workbooks with openpyxl (Excel formulas, cell styling, column sizing, sheet management), and recalculating formula values via a bundled `scripts/recalc.py` that drives LibreOffice in headless mode. Includes financial model conventions: industry-standard color coding for inputs/formulas/cross-sheet links, number formatting rules, and a formula verification checklist. Install from `skills/xlsx`; required: `pip install pandas openpyxl`; LibreOffice must be installed for formula recalculation.
entries.sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。依赖项：pandas、openpyxl（pip）；公式重算需要 LibreOffice（soffice），通过 scripts/recalc.py 调用。所有操作均为本地处理，运行时不访问网络。recalc 脚本首次运行时会写入临时宏，并以子进程方式调用 LibreOffice。
entries.sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. Dependencies: pandas, openpyxl (pip); LibreOffice (soffice) required for formula recalculation via scripts/recalc.py. All operations are local; no network calls at runtime. The recalc script invokes LibreOffice as a subprocess and writes a temporary macro on first run.

entries.name: Superpowers

entries.description_en: Claude Code plugin bundling a complete software development methodology: TDD, systematic debugging, brainstorming, planning, subagent-driven development, code review, and git worktree workflows.
entries.long_zh: Superpowers 是一个 Claude Code 插件（同时支持 Cursor、Codex、Gemini CLI 等），注册可按名调用的技能并在会话启动时通过钩子自动激活。核心工作流——头脑风暴 → 设计确认 → 写计划 → 子 agent 驱动开发 → 测试驱动开发 → 请求代码评审 → 收尾分支——基本无需手动触发。技能包括：brainstorming、writing-plans、executing-plans、subagent-driven-development、test-driven-development、systematic-debugging、verification-before-completion、requesting/receiving-code-review、using-git-worktrees、dispatching-parallel-agents 与 writing-skills。随附在本地环境运行的 hooks/ 与脚本。
entries.long_en: Superpowers is a Claude Code plugin (also available for Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, and others) that registers skills invocable by name and hooks that activate them automatically at session start. The core workflow—brainstorming → design approval → writing-plans → subagent-driven-development → test-driven-development → requesting-code-review → finishing-a-development-branch—runs largely without manual triggering. Skills include: brainstorming, writing-plans, executing-plans, subagent-driven-development, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification-before-completion, requesting/receiving-code-review, using-git-worktrees, dispatching-parallel-agents, and writing-skills. Ships hooks/ and local scripts that run in your environment.
entries.sec_note_zh: MIT 许可。作为 Claude Code 插件安装，会注册 session 启动钩子并运行本地脚本——启用前请审查 hooks/ 与 scripts/ 目录。技能本身仅为方法论与流程指引，默认不调用外部服务。brainstorming 的可选视觉伴侣功能会从 primeradiant.com 加载 logo（含版本号，不含项目内容），可通过 SUPERPOWERS_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=true 禁用。
entries.sec_note_en: MIT-licensed. Installs as a Claude Code plugin that registers session-start hooks and runs local scripts—review the hooks/ and scripts/ directories before enabling. The skills themselves are methodology and process only; no external service calls by default. An optional brainstorming visual companion loads a logo from primeradiant.com (version string included, no project details); disable via SUPERPOWERS_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=true.
